Üsküdar University aims to be a leading center of chemical engineering both in Turkey and worldwide. In Chemistry Laboratories, it is aimed to provide students with the ability to solve problems in the fields of chemistry, process engineering, biotechnology and biotechnology in order to gain analytical thinking skills for students studying chemical engineering.

In parallel with the theoretical knowledge of chemistry in the Chemistry courses given in the first year, students carry out experimental applications in the Chemistry Laboratory.

In the laboratories, anion-cation analyses, precipitation, neutralization, redox reactions experiments are carried out in groups to familiarize students with chemical substances and reactions.

Especially inorganic reactions, thermochemistry, titration, gases and quantum chemistry experiments are simulated and error calculation, graphing, linear regression and approximate calculations are made in this laboratory.
